title: Why AI-assisted DSA practice works on CodeGrind
summary: Showcase how AI-assisted guidance complements DSA practice on CodeGrind, highlighting real-time hints, problem-solving prompts, and progression through a sample challenge.
core_message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance to help learners scaffold reasoning, visualize concepts, and improve success rates through interactive feedback and progressive challenges.
cta: Try a sample problem with AI assistant guidance and share your learning progress.
visual_brief: A short 15-20s demo video: screen captures of the CodeGrind editor with AI chat assistance, highlighting problem statement, real-time hints, and code feedback; include cyberpunk aesthetic hints and subtle UI glow to match CodeGrind branding.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
